title: 32x Armor trims
body:
32x texture packs(pvp packs especially) always have 32x armor but 16x armor trims, this texture pack fixes that

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

# Use

It's made mainly for texture pack creators to use in their 32x packs just to take care of that inconsistency so Feel free to use this in ur pack, It's made for that

Do try credit me though

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/588cc9629aef881631ea16cb426f65c4c99938d5.png)
